description: A psychology teacher preparing a graduate seminar has collected Iowa Gambling Task (IGT) data for a class demonstration. Using the trial-by-trial choice data at ~/pebl/data/igt_data.csv, generate a JSON report at ~/pebl/analysis/igt_report.json. For each participant, calculate net scores for five 20-trial blocks (defined as (count of C and D) - (count of A and B)), the overall net score, and the learning effect (mean of blocks 4 and 5 net scores minus mean of blocks 1 and 2 net scores). Exclude participants exhibiting completely perseverative strategies (e.g., 100% selection of one deck). The final JSON must contain a 'participants' list (including 'id
